title: Trexquant Earnings Return Prediction — Improved Progressive Pipeline

1_cv_leakage_hardening.description: Purged walk-forward splits by di with embargo; all transforms fit on train fold only

2_target_geometry_alignment.description: Date-wise rank-normalised and z-scored target variants; models trained on transformed targets, evaluated on original Pearson

3_xs_feature_upgrades.description: Added per-date robust z-score (MAD-based) and sector-relative rank transforms for all/top features

4_regime_specialist_models.description: Separate LightGBM models for top500 vs non-top500 liquidity segments with clean OOF routing

5_model_diversity.description: Second LightGBM with orthogonal params (deeper trees, aggressive colsample, lower LR, rank target); XGBoost API fixed for v3.x

6_pearson_first_blending.description: Constrained SLSQP non-negative sum-to-1 OOF weight optimisation with fold-consistency stability check

7_post_processing.description: Per-date z-score standardisation of final predictions; submission safety checks (finite, >=10% non-zero)

8_feature_detection_fix.description: Robust 3-tier feature detection: strict f\d+, then f_*/feat*/feature*, then numeric fallback; safe pd.to_numeric casting

key_cells_to_run.feature_setup: Cell 4 — data loading and schema detection
key_cells_to_run.xs_features: Cell 19 — robust z-score and sector-relative rank
key_cells_to_run.fe_assembly: Cell 30 — full feature matrix assembly + LGB Exp5
key_cells_to_run.diverse_lgb: Cell 39 — LGB with orthogonal params + rank target

xgboost_api_fix: early_stopping_rounds moved from fit() to XGBRegressor constructor (required for XGBoost >= 2.0/3.x)
